# retro-collection-tool

> Production-oriented CLI wrapper around Igir for curated ROMM library workflows, including retail sync, hacks, BIOS import, arcade DAT handling, export, and bootstrap.

Use the docs home first for operator context. Use configuration and commands for day-to-day work. Use architecture only when changing or reviewing implementation.

## Core Docs

- [Docs Home](./): Curated landing page for capabilities and task entrypoints.
- [Configuration](./configuration/): Config layering, root selection, and the settings that shape library operations.
- [Commands](./commands/): CLI flags, workflow entrypoints, and practical usage examples.
- [RomVault Arcade Workflow](./workflow-romvault-arcade/): Process notes for arcade vault sorting and DAT-driven handling.

## Contributor Docs

- [Architecture](./architecture/): Internal module boundaries, execution flow, and where policy lives in the codebase.

## Optional

- [TODO](./todo/): Lower-priority backlog, rough ideas, and future work that is not needed for normal operation.
